name: FAI_SAM_RAW_PROCESSOUT
description: This table stores processout records for sam ai consumption

columns.Name: RAW_PROCESSOUT_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key of the process out data

columns.Name: CONTEXT
columns.Comments: Context in which process out data were executed

columns.Name: KEY
columns.Comments: Unique key of the process out data

columns.Name: VALUE
columns.Comments: Value of the process out data for a key

columns.Name: DATE_DATA
columns.Comments: Date on which this record was executed

columns.Name: COLLECTION_TIME
columns.Comments: Time of the collection of the process out

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: Status of the executed record in processout

columns.Name: CONSUMER_DATA_KEY
columns.Comments: Reference Key on the consumer side

columns.Name: ANOMALY_LOOP
columns.Comments: Loop back on accuracy of the anomaly

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: RAW_LOAD_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to the fai_sam_raw_load table
